name: pony_default
description: Pony Diffusion V6 XL — SDXL-based, character art and NSFW capable

inputs.text: score_1, score_2, score_3, deformed, ugly, blurry, bad anatomy, bad proportions, extra limbs, mutated hands, poorly drawn face, watermark, text, signature, logo

settings.negative_prompt: score_1, score_2, score_3, deformed, ugly, blurry, bad anatomy, bad proportions, extra limbs, mutated hands, poorly drawn face, watermark, text, signature, logo

notes: Pony Diffusion V6 XL uses SDXL architecture. Requires score tags for quality control. Minimum 1024px on longest side. Best with euler_ancestral sampler and cfg 7.0. Good at character portraits, anime style, and NSFW content.
